mechanism_narrative: A decline in FEDFUNDS with stable CPIAUCSL lowers real rates and equity discount rates, which raises S&P 500 prices over the next month. The signal is strongest when inflation is not accelerating, because easing then reads as liquidity support rather than policy panic.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS falls by at least 0.25 pp over the prior 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if triggered episodes do not show higher 20d SPX returns than non-triggered episodes, or if returns are negative in a majority of cases despite falling FEDFUNDS.

mechanism_narrative: A rising UNRATE signals weakening household income growth and weaker future consumption, which should pressure cyclically sensitive equities. When unemployment is climbing, SPX forward returns over the next month should be negative.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.3 pp over the prior 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if UNRATE-up triggers are followed by positive 20d SPX returns more often than negative returns, or if the signal has no directional separation from baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous rise in PAYEMS and RSAFS indicates broad labor income gains and stronger retail demand, which supports corporate revenues and improves near-term SPX returns. The effect requires both labor and spending to strengthen together, not just one alone.
failure_condition: Reject if joint PAYEMS-RSAFS improvements do not outperform single-series signals, or if SPX 20d returns are not higher when both series rise together.

mechanism_narrative: An upside turn in INDPRO after a prior slowdown indicates recovering factory output and inventory normalization, which should lift earnings expectations for industrial and cyclical firms. That recovery should translate into positive S&P 500 returns over the following quarter.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO rises for 2 consecutive months after a 3-month decline
failure_condition: Reject if industrial recovery triggers are followed by flat or negative 60d SPX returns, or if the hit rate is not better than unconditional performance.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in HOUST after a prior high level signals tightening housing demand and weaker construction-linked activity, which often precedes broader consumption softness and lower equity returns. The signal should be negative over the next month when housing starts fall sharply.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls by at least 8% from its 3-month moving average
failure_condition: Reject if sharp HOUST declines are not followed by weaker 20d SPX returns, or if the average return after the trigger is not below zero.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL is accelerating while FEDFUNDS remains near zero, the market reads policy as unable to tighten and real rates as still depressed, which supports risk assets. Under this low-rate inflation regime, SPX should post positive short-horizon returns.
failure_condition: Reject if episodes with rising CPIAUCSL and FEDFUNDS below 0.5% do not produce positive 5d SPX returns, or if the interaction has no incremental predictive value.

mechanism_narrative: A rising PAYEMS series after a soft labor print signals payroll reacceleration and better forward earnings breadth, which should support SPX returns over the next month. The signal is strongest when unemployment is not rising at the same time.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS increases by at least 0.15% month-over-month
failure_condition: Reject if payroll growth episodes fail to outperform baseline on 20d SPX returns, or if the positive effect disappears when UNRATE is flat or falling.

mechanism_narrative: During a confirmed GDP slowdown, weak GDPC1 growth combined with soft RSAFS indicates broad demand contraction that should depress earnings expectations and produce negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter. The mechanism fails when GDP and retail sales both reaccelerate.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 growth is below 1.5% annualized over the latest two quarters
failure_condition: Reject if low-GDP-growth periods with weak retail sales do not lead to negative 60d SPX returns, or if the combined signal is not worse than either proxy alone.
